node.text: John and his programmer friends organized an online competition last week.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "programming event hosted") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John met three new friends in his programming course last Tuesday and is excited to expand his social circle.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "programming event hosted") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: John volunteered his programming skills for a social cause, creating a software tool for a charitable foundation to streamline their operations.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "programming event hosted") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: John has been teaching his siblings coding, and they are creating their own programs.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "programming event hosted") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: John expressed excitement about James releasing his first game for the gaming community.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "programming event hosted") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.90)

node.text: John's siblings are starting with basic games and stories in their coding journey.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "programming event hosted") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.89)

node.text: John was inspired by the foundation's passion for helping children and used his coding skills to contribute and challenge himself.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "programming event hosted") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.83)

node.text: John is proud of his siblings for learning coding and is excited to see what they create with their skills.

node.text: John encourages James to continue with game development and expresses belief in his talents.

node.text: John assures James of his support and cooperation in their endeavors.
